data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by limiting options to improve user experience.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes predictive algorithms to streamline choices and increase conversion rates.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes navigation by sizing and positioning clickable elements based on user behaviors.
data.technical_spec: Employs responsive design for ease of accessibility in mobile and desktop views.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Aligns interface designs with user expectations based on familiar site patterns.
data.technical_spec: Maintains a consistent layout and design language across different pages and services.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items visually to make interfaces more intuitive.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes whitespace and grouping strategies for better user navigation and understanding.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Groups content into smaller, digestible chunks to improve information processing.
data.technical_spec: Adopts concise text blocks and bullet points for product descriptions and customer feedback.
